name: Home Assistant
label: Home Assistant
description: Adds Home Assistant rooms, devices, entities, automations, scenes, scripts and events to LavronOS.
summary: Connects LavronOS to Home Assistant through secure bridge pairing and real smart-home snapshots.
author: LavronOS

dashboardWidgets.title: Home Assistant
dashboardWidgets.description: Bridge state and the latest Home Assistant snapshot.

changelog: 0.3.8 - Restored the complete v0.11 Home Assistant interface inside the independent module package.
0.3.7 - Added a product runtime dashboard and first-run connection guidance.
0.3.6 - Added module-owned settings and server runtime hooks.
0.3.5 - Moved the module into an independent repository with versioned Marketplace releases.
0.3.4 - Improved registry refresh and room/device grouping.
